overview: Demon Imp is a Normal-class Demon monster found in Inferno. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 40 HP, 19 physical damage, 70 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 6. 0 attacks, 0 combo chains. Sight range 900. Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Casting Heal Nightmare.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Ice, Light, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-3000), Light (-3000), Divine (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Casting Heal Nightmare
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Casting Heal Nightmare. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 900 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 900 units, loses target at 1800 units, 180° vision angle.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 50 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Casting Heal Nightmare

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 900 units. Loses target at 1800 units.
